chunks.title: Judicial and Social Laws
chunks.reason: A cohesive unit of legal instructions regarding witnesses, justice, and treatment of others.

chunks.title: Sabbatical Year and Rest
chunks.reason: Instructions on agricultural cycles and the weekly Sabbath rest.

chunks.title: Feast Regulations
chunks.reason: Detailed commands concerning the three annual feasts and sacrificial offerings.

chunks.title: Promise of Conquest
chunks.reason: A divine oracle promising guidance, victory over enemies, and the boundaries of the land.
